license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qaedsbe
title: Bacterial two hybrid analysis
author: Yuan Yao

steps_raw.instruction: The two recombinant plasmids encoding the T25-X (or X-T25) and T18-Y (or Y-T18) hybrid proteins are transformed into competent BTH101 reporter cells.
Co-transform two plasmids (pKNT-topA and pUT-rstA) into BTH101 competent Cells.
Transformants are plated on selective plates and incubated at 30°C for 40 hours.
